---
title: "Power BI Dashboard — Sales Analysis"
description: "An interactive business dashboard built in Power BI analysing sales trends and KPIs."
date: "2025-04-19"
categories: [Power BI, Data Visualisation, Business Analytics]
image: images/powerbi-thumbnail.png
---

## Overview
Brief intro — what business problem does this dashboard solve? What data did you use?

## Dashboard
![Power BI Dashboard](images/powerbi-thumbnail.png){fig-align="center" width="100%"}

## Key Insights
- Insight 1 from your dashboard
- Insight 2
- Insight 3

## Tools Used
- Power BI Desktop
- Data source: [e.g. Excel, SQL, CSV]

## Conclusion
What decisions could a business make using this dashboard?
